description_long: This object is a rolled-up newspaper secured with a blue band around its center. The newspaper is cylindrical in shape, with visible printed text and lines simulating headlines and columns, and the word 'NEWSPAPER' is clearly legible on the outermost sheet. The blue band is opaque and features some white markings, possibly simulating branding or a logo. The ends of the roll reveal the concentric layers of paper, giving a realistic impression of a tightly rolled bundle. The paper appears to be standard newsprint, with a slightly off-white color and a matte finish. There are no visible racks, windows, or payment mechanisms, indicating this is a single newspaper rather than a full stand.
description: A rolled-up newspaper with a blue band, featuring visible printed text and a realistic paper texture.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'NEWSPAPER' headline and the blue band wrapped around the center.
description_view_1: End-on view displaying the concentric layers of the rolled paper and the hollow center.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the blue band and more printed lines, less headline text visible.
description_view_3: Angled view highlighting the rolled structure and the blue band, with partial headline text.
